description: Style NoteWedge heels have been in style for quite long and with Catwalks new innovations they still remain in fashion. These pretty bright coloured heels will make you look stunning and can be matched with a skirt or nice pair of capris.Heel: 2.5''Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a teal strap at the forefoot and an ankle loop with a zipperRectangular stones along the forefoot Brown footpad with a heel patchWedge heels with matt detailing with plastic heel capMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
